behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction explicitly names typeOrder, typeLabels with exact values, conventionalMatch variable, resolveAuthorForPR, prAuthorCache, removal of resolveAuthorForCommit/authorCache/appendAuthors, --no-merges, --pretty=format:"%h %ae %s", groups[type], typeIndex, ### ${label} headings, and the prohibition on fs.readFileSync(changelogPath).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction dictates specific implementation details like variable names ('conventionalMatch', 'typeOrder', 'typeLabels', 'groups', 'typeIndex'), exact regex pattern, exact git log format string, and exact label strings, leaving little reasoning about WHAT to change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on gold-specific variable names like 'conventionalMatch', 'typeOrder', 'typeLabels', 'groups[type]', 'typeIndex', and 'prAuthorCache'—alternate correct implementations using different names would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All f2p tests use read_script() and regex/substring checks (e.g., test_typeorder_array_exists, test_conventional_commit_parsing); only pass_to_pass tests execute node/eslint/prettier. No test actually runs the script to verify changelog output.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test checks for specific tokens required by the refactor (typeOrder, typeLabels, conventionalMatch, absence of fs.readFileSync(changelogPath), --no-merges), which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover typeOrder, typeLabels, conventional parsing, grouping, ### heading, no CHANGELOG.md read, git log format, --no-merges, removed appendAuthors/resolveAuthorForCommit, type sorting, and preserved PR author resolution.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped into Fail-to-Pass and Pass-to-Pass sections with comment headers and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces markdown changelog text, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: Paths, function names, and literals in instruction match those in tests and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the target file scripts/create-github-release.mjs which is the task domain itself; no line-number leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-edit task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
